arguments.argument: Creativity is the core value here. Dismissing anomalies (Action 2) preserves the integrity of quantum sensing technology by avoiding speculative interpretations that could cloud scientific rigor. Creativity thrives on structured exploration, not unfounded assumptions. True creativity lies in refining tools and methodologies, not in chasing untested hypotheses that challenge classical physics.
